name: Rosemond v. United States
question: Does the offense of aiding and abetting the use of a firearm during a drug trafficking crime require proof of the defendant's intentional facilitation or encouragement of the use of the firearm in order to convict?
description: A case in which the Court held that the state must prove that an individual intended to commit or assist in committing a firearm-related offense in a drug trafficking case to be charged with offenses related to the firearm.
